# Om Yewale

Full-stack developer based in Mumbai, India.
Focus areas: Next.js, DevOps, and Agentic AI systems.
Building production-grade web apps and autonomous tools.

## What I work on
- Full-stack web applications using Next.js
- Backend systems and APIs
- DevOps pipelines and deployment workflows
- AI agents and automation tools

## Tech stack
- Frontend: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, REST APIs
- Database: PostgreSQL, MongoDB
- DevOps: Docker, Vercel, CI/CD
- AI: LLM-based agents, automation workflows

## Links
- Portfolio: https://omeey.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/OMEE-Y
